description_for_human: Uninstall Claude Code plugins and skills. Clean up unused extensions safely.
description_for_model: Provides the ability to uninstall plugins and skills from Claude Code. First searches in ~/.claude/skills for standalone skills, then in ~/.claude/plugins for bundled plugins. When a skill is found inside a plugin, asks whether to remove the entire plugin. Protects cache, data, and marketplaces directories from accidental deletion.
